evals.prompt: Search for the latest news about 'James Webb Space Telescope' using the search-web skill and get results in JSON format.
evals.expected_output: A JSON list containing search result objects with titles, urls, and alt descriptions.
expectations: The output is a valid JSON array
At least one result contains 'telescope' or 'webb' in the title or alt text

evals.prompt: Search for images of 'mountains' in markdown format using the search-web skill.
evals.expected_output: A list of markdown image tags matching mountains.
expectations: The output contains markdown image syntax: ![alt](url "title")

evals.prompt: Perform a reverse image search on the remote URL 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1514888286974-6c03e2ca1dba' to find pages containing it, using format json.
evals.expected_output: Search results pointing to pages or articles related to the input image.
expectations: The output contains links or web page URLs
The rate limiter is active and spacing requests correctly
